category_sources: source_facts.description says Latino is an open source programming language for Latinos and Hispanic speakers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Lenguaje Latino site; source_facts.description names the programming language Latino.
docs_sources: Official Manual Latino documentation is hosted under the official lenguajelatino.org domain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an open source programming language for Latino and Hispanic speakers; source_facts.executables lists the latino CLI.
